reviews.review_description: Even though it's not fully functional yet (you can only see the layout of the rooms and listen to YouTube) i see major potential for this app. The app should allow people to visit, listen to their own music, let people customize the main room with laser lights etc depending on the music they are listening to. In the lounge rooms where you talk and connect maybe add features like a shuffle board,  beer pong,  pool table or dart board to complete the experience. I really think this could be a cool escape for some like me after hours who don't get out much anymore because family life👍
Had a great time and didn't have to drive home! #nodwi

It's different and looks dope, I became a member and met the devs, they didn't advertise so no one is in here. This place should be packed! I'm staying a member for a while to see if it gets populated. 

The entrance content is worth it

This app looks really cool. Can't wait to meet more people.
Good for adults!!
I found this from a post on Reddit. If you know you know!
